---
title: "Visualizing World Happiness"
description: |
  A short description of the post.
author:
  - name: Binod Jung Bogati
date: 08-19-2019
draft: true
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    highlight: null

categories:
  - visualization

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

In this article, I’ve covered the visualization of World Happiness Report.

The World Happiness Report 2018 is a survey which has data on global happiness. The report ranks 156 countries by their happiness level.

### The happiest countries in the World


### The least happy countries in the World


### Heatmap of Happiness Data

### Happiness Bar of South Asian

### Corruption Score of South Asian

### Life Expectancy of South Asian

### Happiness Score vs Region


### Economy vs Region


### Life Expectancy vs Region


### Corruption vs Region


Finally, the project code can be found in World Happiness Report at Github.
